title: Poultry low-temperature safety note
description: If a recipe suggests holding or cooking poultry at low temperatures (sous vide, water bath, vacuum, or explicit low-temp language), check for recommended time/temperature to ensure safe pasteurization.
suggestionTemplate: This recipe references low-temperature cooking for poultry. Ensure it includes safe time/temperature notes (e.g., 60°C for 2 hours for pasteurization) or use higher temperatures to guarantee safety.
